race.description: City Of Wollongong Rsl SubBranch Conditional Hcp
race.comment: KITTY OKAY (6) scored last start over 1400m at this track to make it two wins from four runs this time in. Has been nudged out at Warwick Farm prior and will position forward from an inside barrier. Expecting another bold showing. CHEEKY SMIRK (9) was below his best last time out over 1300m at Hawkesbury, ridden with cover. Led the one before placing as favourite at Canberra off a first-up placing here. He has the rail and we'll probably see him back on the bunny. Fitter again and has each-way claims. LAUREL HILL (4) is up from Canberra and she looked a run short at Wyong first-up. Has the outside gate, but the 3kg claim is handy and the honest mare should be around the mark. Ditto BOLD AND BLAZEN (7) off a decent enough run at Wyong.
